## Screenshots

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem (especially for GUI issues, board rendering, or card layouts). Drag-and-drop images directly into this issue. -->


## Your settings

<!--
Please share the relevant parts of your configuration:
- AnkiGammon version (Help → About, or check the title bar)
- OS (Windows / macOS / Linux + version)
- Analysis engine (GnuBG or eXtreme Gammon) and analysis level/ply
- Input format being imported (.mat, .sgf, .xg, .txt, GnuBG match, etc.)
- Export method (AnkiConnect or .apkg file)
- Any non-default settings that might be relevant (board orientation, color scheme, deck structure, etc.)

Tip: you can also attach your settings file from `~/.ankigammon/settings.json` if you're comfortable sharing it.
-->


## Sample file (if applicable)

<!-- If the bug is triggered by a specific input file, please attach a minimal example (.mat, .sgf, .xg, etc.) that reproduces the issue. Drag-and-drop the file into this issue. -->


## Logs / error messages

<!--
If the app crashed or showed an error, paste the relevant output here.

Useful log locations:
- `~/.ankigammon/debug_gnubg_output.txt` (GnuBG analysis output)
- `~/.ankigammon/faulthandler.log` (Windows crash log)
- Console output if you ran from the command line
-->
